content: Radix UI asChild (via Slot from @radix-ui/react-slot) clones the child element and merges Radix's injected props/handlers onto it instead of rendering a wrapper DOM node. All received props, including arbitrary data-* attributes, are spread onto the underlying DOM element by both Radix primitives and shadcn/ui's own components (Button/Input spread {...props} onto native button/input via Comp = asChild ? Slot : 'button'). Risk is component-specific: only breaks if a custom child component fails to forward props to its own root DOM node.
